name: Roland T-8
use: Beat programming, rhythm sequences, bass synth, live TR-REC
overview: Compact TR-style drum machine with built-in bass synthesizer. Program step sequences for drums and bass independently, then chain them into songs. Both the rhythm and bass track lengths are independent — use this for polyrhythms.
workflow: Turn <kbd>[TEMPO/VALUE]</kbd> to set BPM → press <kbd>[PLAY]</kbd> to start playback
While playing: press step buttons <kbd>[1–16]</kbd> to toggle hits on/off (live TR-REC)
<kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[G# (RANDOM RHYTHM)]</kbd> → instant random pattern; <kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[A (RANDOM BASS)]</kbd> for bass
<kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[D# (LAST)]</kbd> → turn <kbd>[TEMPO/VALUE]</kbd> to set last step (set independently per rhythm/bass)
<kbd>[KYBD]</kbd> button → press keyboard buttons to enter bass notes; <kbd>[SLIDE]</kbd> = portamento, <kbd>[ACCENT]</kbd> = accent
<kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[F# (FILL TRG)]</kbd> to trigger fill; <kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[G (FILL PTN)]</kbd> to choose fill source
<kbd>[SHIFT]</kbd> + <kbd>[OCT+ (MENU)]</kbd> → scroll with <kbd>[TEMPO/VALUE]</kbd> → press <kbd>[C# (ENTER)]</kbd> to set side chain, MIDI, sync, etc.

shortcuts.action: Set pattern last step — set independently for rhythm and bass
Switch to page 2 (steps 17–32); extends last step to 32 if needed
Insert fill-in at end of pattern (uses FILL PTN source)
Set fill source pattern via step buttons 1–16
Open settings menu (side chain, MIDI, sync, tempo) ★
Side chain depth — duck mix using a rhythm instrument as trigger
Side chain ducking depth for instrument / delay-reverb / USB input
Side chain trigger source: bd, Sd, CLAP, tON, CH, OH
MIDI clock sync: AUTO / Int / MIDI / USB
Set MIDI channel for rhythm / bass separately

tips: Polyrhythm: set rhythm LAST STEP to 12, bass LAST STEP to 16 — they drift against each other
Random + tweak: hit RANDOM RHYTHM then mute/unmute steps to shape — fastest way to a new beat
Side chain in menu: SC depth <50 = duck depth, >50 = sustain time. SŹdG sets which elements get ducked
Pattern Sync=OnCE: if rhythm/bass last steps differ, press once to sync them up on next restart
